corridors.notes: Phase-1 illustrative rules for the Addis→Nairobi coffee scenario. Not legal advice.

required_documents.name: Certificate of Origin
required_documents.rationale: Origin evidence for preferential treatment and customs clearance (e.g. COMESA/EAC context).

required_documents.name: Phytosanitary Certificate
required_documents.rationale: Plant-health clearance for coffee and other regulated plant products entering Kenya.

required_documents.name: Commercial Invoice
required_documents.rationale: Value, quantity, and parties for customs valuation.

required_documents.name: Packing List
required_documents.rationale: Package-level detail matching the invoice and shipment.
